name: Generic CRM Public Governance Example
description: Public-safe example for recording generic CRM governance boundaries. This is not a connector, API client, credential store, customer-data access grant, background sync job, automatic scanner, or automatic execution path.

access.credential_policy: Do not store CRM credentials, passwords, API keys, tokens, cookies, session values, customer exports, or private secrets in this profile.

required_permissions: unknown until user confirmation and host Runtime evidence confirm the task scope
forbidden_operations: Do not store CRM credentials or customer data in this profile.
Do not infer customer, contact, deal, account, pipeline, export, or write access from the CRM system type.
Do not create, update, delete, export, sync, enrich, or notify customer records from this profile.
Do not claim API access, admin permission, export permission, or automation access unless confirmed by the user and current host Runtime evidence.
Do not treat this profile as a CRM connector, API client, scanner, validator, background sync job, or automatic execution path.

external_writes.notes: Any contact, company, deal, ticket, workflow, export, notification, or automation change requires explicit user approval and current host Runtime evidence outside this profile.

verified: This file is a public-safe example with placeholder CRM names and no customer data.
not_run: No CRM API call was made.
No CRM connector, credential, account, contact, deal, ticket, pipeline, export, workflow, notification, or admin setting was accessed.
No permission, billing, role, write-access, export, or API availability check was executed.
missing: Real CRM account access, contact read access, deal write access, export permission, admin role, workflow ownership, and API availability require user confirmation and host Runtime evidence.
